hotspot_matches.identified: Projection computation: call opernla_ylm / opernla_ylm_mv inside atom-type/block loops ("Compute projection <p_lmn|c>")

Contraction in projector space: call opernlc_ylm (Dij/Sij contraction) for choice>0 and choice/=7
Phase-factor preparation: call ph1d3d for kgin/kgout when nloalg(2)<=0
Memory allocation/initialization of large temporaries inside inner block loop (ABI_MALLOC + zeroing gx/gxfac/dgxdt/...)
